title: App Auto-Patch (xyz.techitout.appAutoPatch)
description: This will configure the settings for the App Auto-Patch tool

DaysUntilReset.title: Days Until Reset
DaysUntilReset.description: The number of days after the patching cadence start date (Zero Date) that the patching complete status will reset from TRUE to FALSE

PatchWeekStartDay.title: Patch Week Start Day
PatchWeekStartDay.description: The day of the week to force the patching cadence start date (Zero Date) to go back to in order to have the patch cadence start the same day of the week for all users

DeadlineCountFocus.title: Focus Count Deadline
DeadlineCountFocus.description: The maximum number of automatic deferrals allowed if the system is in user-enabled Focus/Do Not Disturb or when a process has requested that the display not go to sleep

DeadlineCountHard.title: Hard Count Deadline
DeadlineCountHard.description: The maximum number of user selected deferrals allowed before App Auto-Patch will no longer allow deferrals and will automatically patch when the timer expires

DeadlineDaysFocus.title: Focus Days Deadline
DeadlineDaysFocus.description: The maximum number of days that automatic deferrals are allowed if the system is in user-enabled Focus/Do Not Disturb or when a process has requested that the display not go to sleep

DeadlineDaysHard.title: Hard Days Deadline
DeadlineDaysHard.description: The maximum number of days deferrals allowed before App Auto-Patch will no longer allow deferrals and will automatically patch when the timer expires

DiscoveryFrequency.title: Discovery Frequency
DiscoveryFrequency.description: The number of hours since the last successful App Discovery before App Auto-Patch will run discovery again. If the workflow resets and re-runs (e.g. after a deferral) within this window, discovery is skipped and the previously discovered queue is reused. A value of 0 forces discovery to run on every workflow execution

DeferralTimerDefault.title: Deferral Timer Default
DeferralTimerDefault.description: The number of minutes to defer until the next update workflow attempt if a user choses not install updates

DeferralTimerError.title: Deferral Timer Error
DeferralTimerError.description: The number of minutes to defer if AAP detects an error in the workflow

DeferralTimerFocus.title: Deferral Timer Focus
DeferralTimerFocus.description: The number of minutes to defer the update restart dialog automatically if a process has prevented display sleep (for example, during an active meeting) or the user has Focus or Do Not Disturb enabled

DeferralTimerMenu.title: Deferral Timer Menu
DeferralTimerMenu.description: Display a deferral time pop-up menu in the non-deadline install dialog that allows the user to override the Deferral Timer Default timer

DeferralTimerWorkflowRelaunch.title: Deferral Timer Workflow Relaunch
DeferralTimerWorkflowRelaunch.description: Amount of time in minutes until AAP is relaunched after a workflow. This timer results in AAP acting as a permanent agent that checks for app updates on a regular basis

MonthlyPatchingCadenceEnabled.title: Monthly Patching Cadence Enabled
MonthlyPatchingCadenceEnabled.description: Determines if Monthly Patching Cadence is enabled. If True, must also configure Ordinal Value, Weekday Index and Start Time

MonthlyPatchingCadenceOrdinalValue.title: Monthly Patching Cadence Ordinal Value
MonthlyPatchingCadenceOrdinalValue.description: Week of the month you want AAP to be scheduled

MonthlyPatchingCadenceWeekdayIndex.title: Monthly Patching Cadence Weekday Index
MonthlyPatchingCadenceWeekdayIndex.description: Day of the week you want AAP to be scheduled

MonthlyPatchingCadenceStartTime.title: Monthly Patching Cadence Start Time
MonthlyPatchingCadenceStartTime.description: Local time you want AAP to be scheduled

ZoomCallActiveCheck.title: Zoom Call Active Check
ZoomCallActiveCheck.description: When enabled, AAP will automatically skip updating Zoom if a call is active

DialogOnTop.title: Dialog On Top
DialogOnTop.description: Forces the AAP dialogs to stay on top of all other windows

DialogTimeoutDeferral.title: Deferral Dialog Timeout
DialogTimeoutDeferral.description: Time given to the user to respond to deferral prompt if enabled

DialogTimeoutDeferralAction.title: Deferral Dialog Timeout Action
DialogTimeoutDeferralAction.description: What happens when the deferral timer expires

DialogTimeoutConfirmInstall.title: Confirm Install Dialog Timeout
DialogTimeoutConfirmInstall.description: The number of seconds given to the user to respond to the "Are you sure?" confirmation dialog shown after clicking Install Now on the deferral dialog. If the timer expires with no response, App Auto-Patch defaults to continuing with the install

UnattendedExit.title: Unattended Exit
UnattendedExit.description: Deterines if the Dialog should automatically close after completion if there is no response from the end-user

UnattendedExitSeconds.title: Unattended Exit Seconds
UnattendedExitSeconds.description: The number of seconds the AAP dialog will automatically close if UnattendedExit is set to TRUE

UseOverlayIcon.title: Use Overlay Icon
UseOverlayIcon.description: Toggles swiftDialog to use an overlay icon

DialogIcon.title: Dialog Icon
DialogIcon.description: Allows you to set a custom icon for the dialog vs. the default Laptop/Desktop symbol

BannerImage.title: Banner Image
BannerImage.description: Displays a swiftDialog banner image in place of the standard title text. Accepts a filepath, a URL, a solid colour (colour=#hex), or a gradient (gradient=colour,colour). When set, this replaces the standard title text banner and hides the standard dialog icon area, matching swiftDialog's own banner behavior. Not applied to the App Discovery or "All Apps Up To Date" mini dialogs, which are too small to display a banner

BannerTitle.title: Banner Title
BannerTitle.description: The text displayed within the banner image set by Banner Image. Falls back to App Title if left blank. Has no effect unless Banner Image is also configured

BannerHeight.title: Banner Height
BannerHeight.description: Overrides the default height, in points, of the banner image set by Banner Image. Invalid (non-integer) values are ignored. Has no effect unless Banner Image is also configured

IgnoredLabels.title: Ignored Labels
IgnoredLabels.description: A space-separated list of Installomator labels to ignore for the AAP workflow. Supports wilddcards

RequiredLabels.title: Required Labels
RequiredLabels.description: a space-separated list of Installomator labels that are required, regardless if the app is installed or or the latest version. Supports wildcards.

OptionalLabels.title: Optional Labels
OptionalLabels.description: A space-separated list of optional Installomator labels. Labels in this category are only included if the app exists on the end-users device and the app is not up to date. **Does not** support wildcards!

inputAttributes.placeholder: 1password8 adobereaderdc amazonchime apparency firefoxpkg vlc zoom

AppTitle.title: App Title
AppTitle.description: Allows you to customize the name of App Auto-Patch to something else

ConvertAppsInHomeFolder.title: Convert Apps In Home Folder
ConvertAppsInHomeFolder.description: This will convert any apps found in the users home folder to the /Applications folder

IgnoreAppsInHomeFolder.title: Ignore Apps In Home Folder
IgnoreAppsInHomeFolder.description: Ignore apps found in '/Users/'. If an update is found in '/Users/' and variable is set to false, the app will be updated into the application's default path

InstallomatorOptions.title: Installomator Options
InstallomatorOptions.description: A space-separated list of options to override default Installomator options (i.e., BLOCKING_PROCESS_ACTION=prompt_user NOTIFY=silent LOGO=jamf)

InstallomatorUpdateDisable.title: Installomator Update Disable
InstallomatorUpdateDisable.description: This will prevent Installomator from automatically updating. If Installomator does not exist in the working folder, it will still download from GitHub to prevent script failure

InstallomatorVersion.title: Installomator Version
InstallomatorVersion.description: Determines if the AAP script should use the Main (beta) or Release version of Installomator. The version from the Main branch typically includes more recent updates from PR's to fix issues or add new labels.

InstallomatorVersionCustomRepoPath.title: Installomator Version Custom Repo Path
InstallomatorVersionCustomRepoPath.description: If InstallomatorVersion is set to Custom, enter the Github Site and Repository name in the following format: site_name/repo_name . For example, if the custom fork is located at https://github.com/TechTrekkie/Installomator, you would set this key to techtrekkie/installomator

InstallomatorVersionCustomBranchName.title: Installomator Version Custom Branch Name
InstallomatorVersionCustomBranchName.description: The name of the branch you want to use in your custom repo, typically main.

RemoveInstallomatorPath.title: Remove Installomator Path
RemoveInstallomatorPath.description: Remove Installomator after App Auto-Patch is completed

SupportTeamName.title: Support Team Name
SupportTeamName.description: For the Support Team details that display in the Help Message

SupportTeamEmail.title: Support Team Email
SupportTeamEmail.description: For the Support Team details that display in the Help Message

SupportTeamPhone.title: Support Team Phone
SupportTeamPhone.description: For the Support Team details that display in the Help Message

SupportTeamWebsite.title: Support Team Website
SupportTeamWebsite.description: For the Support Team details that display in the Help Message

WebhookFeature.title: Webhook Feature
WebhookFeature.description: Determines if Webhooks are sent when patching is completed

WebhookURLSlack.title: Slack Webhook URL
WebhookURLSlack.description: The Slack Webhook URL to use if WebhookFeature is set to TRUE

WebhookURLTeams.title: Teams Webhook URL
WebhookURLTeams.description: The Teams Webhook URL to use if WebhookFeature is set to TRUE

WorkflowDisableAppDiscovery.title: Disable App Discovery Workflow
WorkflowDisableAppDiscovery.description: Disables the discovery of applications that require patching. If a list of labels from a previous discovery exists, AAP will use that list for the workflow

WorkflowBackgroundPatchClosedApps.title: Background Patch Closed Apps
WorkflowBackgroundPatchClosedApps.description: When Interactive Mode is 1 or 2, silently pre-patches apps that are not currently open immediately after discovery and before any deferral/deadline dialog is shown. Apps that are open (blocking process detected) remain in the queue and are presented to the user as normal

WorkflowStageUpdates.title: Stage Updates
WorkflowStageUpdates.description: Pre-downloads (stages) installers for queued updates to a local staging folder immediately after discovery, before the deferral/deadline dialog is shown to the user. This makes the later install step nearly instantaneous for staged updates. Works alongside Background Patch Closed Apps without downloading the same update twice

IgnoreDNDApps.title: Ignore Do Not Disturb Apps
IgnoreDNDApps.description: A comma-separated list of app/process names to exclude from display-sleep assertion (Focus/Do Not Disturb) detection. Useful for background utilities that permanently hold display assertions (e.g. Logi Options+, Amphetamine) that should not block interactive patching. Process names must match exactly as pmset reports them, including spaces

WorkflowDisableRelaunch.title: Disable Relaunch Workflow
WorkflowDisableRelaunch.description: Disable the automatic relaunch of AAP after the current workflow successfully completes

WorkflowInstallNowPatchingStatusAction.title: Workflow Install Now Patching Status Action
WorkflowInstallNowPatchingStatusAction.description: Determines if the Patching Completion Status is set to true when using the --workflow-install-now trigger

SelfUpdateEnabled.title: Self Update Enabled
SelfUpdateEnabled.description: Determines if the Self Update feature is enabled. this will automatically update App Auto-Patch if a new version is posted on github

SelfUpdateFrequency.title: Self Update Frequency
SelfUpdateFrequency.description: The frequency to check for updates to the App Auto-Patch script

versionComparisonMethod.title: Version Comparison Method
versionComparisonMethod.description: Determines the version comparison method used when checking for updates

VersionComparisonInstallomatorFallback.title: Version Comparison Installomator Fallback
VersionComparisonInstallomatorFallback.description: When enabled, if version comparison fails, AAP will fall back to using Installomator for version checking

userInterface.title: User Interface
userInterface.description: All features related to how App Auto Patch defines the user interface.

language.title: Language
language.description: The targeted language locale for the user interface. Note: For a list of locales, please run the following command in Terminal: /usr/bin/locale -a

display_string_defer_today_button.title: Defer Today Button
display_string_defer_today_button.description: Language for the defer button in dialogs when the deferral time is sometime today.

display_string_defer_tomorrow_button.title: Defer Tomorrow Button
display_string_defer_tomorrow_button.description: Language for the defer button in dialogs when the deferral time is tomorrow

display_string_defer_future_button.title: Defer Future Button
display_string_defer_future_button.description: Language for the defer button in dialogs when the deferral time is in the future.

display_string_minutes.title: Minutes Display String
display_string_minutes.description: Language for deferral timer durations - Minutes

display_string_hour.title: Hour Display String
display_string_hour.description: Language for deferral timer durations - Hour

display_string_hours.title: Hours Display String
display_string_hours.description: Language for deferral timer durations - Hours

display_string_and.title: and Display String
display_string_and.description: Language for deferral timer durations - and

display_string_days.title: days Display String
display_string_days.description: Language for deferral timer durations - days

display_string_times.title: times Display String
display_string_times.description: Language for deferral timer durations - times

display_string_there_are.title: There are Display String
display_string_there_are.description: Language for deferral timer durations - There are

display_string_discovery_message.title: Discovery Message
display_string_discovery_message.description: Language for the message displayed during App Discovery

display_string_discovery_action_message.title: Discovery action message
display_string_discovery_action_message.description: Language for the action message during App Discovery

display_string_discovery_progress.title: Discovery progress message
display_string_discovery_progress.description: Langauge for the progress message during App Discovery

display_string_staging_message.title: Staging Dialog Message
display_string_staging_message.description: Language for the message shown on the progress dialog covering the update staging and background-patch-closed-apps phases (Interactive Mode 2 only)

display_string_staging_progress.title: Staging Dialog Progress
display_string_staging_progress.description: Language for the progress text shown while updates are being staged (downloaded ahead of time)

display_string_silent_patch_progress.title: Silent Patch Progress
display_string_silent_patch_progress.description: Language for the progress text shown while closed apps are being silently patched in the background

display_string_deferral_button1.title: Deferral Dialog Button1
display_string_deferral_button1.description: Language for Button1 of the Deferral Dialog

display_string_deferral_button2.title: Deferral Dialog Button2
display_string_deferral_button2.description: Language for Button1 of the Deferral Dialog

display_string_confirminstall_message.title: Confirm Install Dialog Message
display_string_confirminstall_message.description: Language for the message on the "Install Now" confirmation dialog shown after clicking Install Now on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_confirminstall_button1.title: Confirm Install Dialog Button1
display_string_confirminstall_button1.description: Language for Button1 (confirm) of the "Install Now" confirmation dialog

display_string_confirminstall_button2.title: Confirm Install Dialog Button2
display_string_confirminstall_button2.description: Language for Button2 (cancel, returns to Deferral Dialog) of the "Install Now" confirmation dialog

display_string_confirminstall_countdown.title: Confirm Install Dialog Countdown
display_string_confirminstall_countdown.description: Language for the first part of the countdown text on the "Install Now" confirmation dialog, shown before the remaining number of seconds

display_string_confirminstall_countdown_.title: Confirm Install Dialog Countdown Suffix
display_string_confirminstall_countdown_.description: Language for the suffix of the countdown text on the "Install Now" confirmation dialog, shown after the remaining number of seconds

display_string_deferral_infobox1.title: Deferral Dialog Infobox part1
display_string_deferral_infobox1.description: Langauge for part 1 of the infobox on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_deferral_infobox2.title: Deferral Dialog Infobox part2
display_string_deferral_infobox2.description: Langauge for part 2 of the infobox on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_deferral_infobox3.title: Deferral Dialog Infobox part3
display_string_deferral_infobox3.description: Langauge for part 3 of the infobox on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_deferral_message_01.title: Deferral Dialog Message part 1
display_string_deferral_message_01.description: Langauge for part 1 of the message on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_deferral_message_02.title: Deferral Dialog Message part 2
display_string_deferral_message_02.description: Language for part 2 of the message on the Deferral Dialog

display_string_version_current.title: Current Version Prefix
display_string_version_current.description: Language for the "Current Version" prefix shown under each app in the deferral/hard deadline dialog patch lists

display_string_version_new.title: New Version Prefix
display_string_version_new.description: Language for the "New Version" prefix shown under each app in the deferral/hard deadline dialog patch lists

display_string_pendingapps_button_later.title: Pending Apps Dialog "Later" Button (Support App Extension)
display_string_pendingapps_button_later.description: Language for the "Later" button shown by the aap_pending_apps_dialog.zsh Root3 Support App Extension example script (Resources/SupportApp-Extension/) - not used by App Auto-Patch itself

display_string_uptodate_button1.title: All Apps Up To Date Button 1
display_string_uptodate_button1.description: All Apps Up To Date Button 1

display_string_uptodate_message.title: All Apps Up To Date Message
display_string_uptodate_message.description: All Apps Up To Date Message

dialogElements.title: Dialog Elements
dialogElements.description: The individual buttons and text elements that can be customized. This includes per country localization.
